title: Enhance "developer" board view with column type labels
excerpt:
it would be nice to have the column type listed with the column ID in developer mode in the column heading menu. 
I know right now we can go to “change column type” to see the column type but not all column types show th…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
it would be nice to have the column type listed with the column ID in developer mode in the column heading menu.

I know right now we can go to “change column type” to see the column type but not all column types show this menu item. Plus its another click. The value from board.column.type would be preferred.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @anon29275264!

Thank you for the request! I have shared this with our team

Cheers,
Matias
